title: Use of unlicensed trucks on road building projects prohibited
doc_html:
§424.  Use of unlicensed trucks on road building projects prohibited

No road contractor shall hire, for use on road building projects in this state, trucks which have not been properly licensed in this state.  

Whoever violates this Section shall be fined one hundred dollars for each truck so hired.
doc_text:
§424.  Use of unlicensed trucks on road building projects prohibited
No road contractor shall hire, for use on road building projects in this state, trucks which have not been properly licensed in this state.
Whoever violates this Section shall be fined one hundred dollars for each truck so hired.
